postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City: Marmoush double seals FA Cup quarter-final spot
postReview.description: Manchester City piled yet more misery on Newcastle United as they came out on top once again to reach the next round of the FA Cup.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City: Doblete de Marmoush para sellar el pase a cuartos de la FA Cup
postReview.description: El Manchester City volvió a castigar al Newcastle United, ganó de nuevo y selló su pase a la siguiente ronda de la FA Cup.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City: Dobradinha de Marmoush garante vaga nas quartas de final da Copa da Inglaterra
postReview.description: O Manchester City voltou a vencer o Newcastle United e avançou à próxima fase da Copa da Inglaterra.

postReview.title: Newcastle United-Manchester City 1-3: doppietta di Marmoush, City ai quarti di FA Cup
postReview.description: Il Manchester City ha inflitto un’altra delusione al Newcastle United, vincendo ancora una volta e centrando la qualificazione al turno successivo di FA Cup.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City : le doublé de Marmoush envoie City en quarts de finale de la FA Cup
postReview.description: Manchester City a enfoncé Newcastle United en s'imposant une nouvelle fois pour se qualifier pour le tour suivant de la FA Cup.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City: Marmoush-Doppelpack sichert FA-Cup-Viertelfinalticket
postReview.description: Manchester City setzte sich erneut gegen Newcastle United durch und zog in die nächste Runde im FA Cup ein.

postReview.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد 1-3 مانشستر سيتي: ثنائية مرموش تحسم بطاقة التأهل إلى ربع نهائي كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي
postReview.description: واصل مانشستر سيتي تعميق معاناة نيوكاسل يونايتد بعدما خرج منتصراً مجدداً ليبلغ الدور التالي من كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 1-3 Manchester City: bis de Marmoush garante vaga nos quartos de final da Taça de Inglaterra
postReview.description: Marmoush bisou e o Manchester City voltou a bater o Newcastle United para seguir em frente na Taça de Inglaterra.

preReview.title: Preview: Newcastle United meet familiar foes Man City in the FA Cup
Howe quiere mantener la dinámica positiva ante el Manchester City
preReview.description: El Newcastle United volvió a la senda del triunfo en la Premier League ante el Manchester United y ahora se mide al Manchester City en la FA Cup.

preReview.title: Howe punta a portare lo slancio positivo nella sfida con il Man City
preReview.description: Il Newcastle United è tornato in carreggiata in Premier League battendo il Manchester United e ora affronta il Manchester City in FA Cup.

preReview.title: Howe quer levar o embalo positivo para o duelo contra o Manchester City
preReview.description: O Newcastle United voltou a vencer na Premier League ao bater o Manchester United e agora encara o Manchester City na Copa da Inglaterra.

preReview.title: Howe veut surfer sur la dynamique positive avant le duel contre Man City
preReview.description: Newcastle United s'est relancé en Premier League en battant Manchester United et affronte désormais Manchester City en FA Cup.

preReview.title: Howe will den positiven Schwung ins Duell mit Man City mitnehmen
preReview.description: Newcastle United hat in der Premier League mit einem Sieg gegen Manchester United zurück in die Spur gefunden – nun wartet im FA Cup Manchester City.

preReview.title: هاو يسعى لمواصلة الزخم الإيجابي قبل مواجهة مانشستر سيتي
preReview.description: عاد نيوكاسل يونايتد إلى سكة الانتصارات في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز بفوزه على مانشستر يونايتد، قبل أن يواجه مانشستر سيتي في كأس الاتحاد الإنجليزي.

preReview.title: Howe quer manter o embalo positivo no duelo com o Man City
preReview.description: O Newcastle United voltou às vitórias na Premier League frente ao Manchester United e agora defronta o Manchester City na Taça de Inglaterra.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
